description: Simmons navigates Hydra-controlled society, attempting to find help and a means of escape. She interacts with suspicious bystanders, trying to maintain her cover, and eventually has her identity questioned by citizens and agents. These encounters highlight the surveillance and paranoia of the Hydra regime and Simmons's growing sense of isolation and danger.
location: Framework (virtual reality simulation / Dr. Radcliffe / Aida construct)

transcript.line: Oh, I was just hiking. I tripped. So clumsy.
Well, that's not very nice. No, I fell. And I just want to get home.
Yeah. Okay. Oh. I must have lost it in the fall, I guess.
Based on what? My... My clothes? My accent? I told you, I lost my I.D.
